headline: PTC Therapeutics Appoints Biotech Banking Pioneer Jessica Chutter to Board of Directors
summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc., (NASDAQ: PTCT) today announced the appointment of Jessica Chutter to its Board of Directors. Ms. Chutter is a highly accomplished biotechnology investment banker with an extensive list of achievements over her long tenure at Morgan Stanley, including building and leading the bank's biotechnology franchise.

headline: How The Aon (AON) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Price Targets
summary: Price targets on Aon are being nudged around the edges, with some firms trimming estimates by up to US$57 while others cluster new targets in the mid to high US$300s and low US$400s. These moves are tied to how different analysts weigh softer P&C pricing, AI related cost pressure, and the importance of underwriting quality and margins. Read on to see what these shifts mean for you and how to track the way the Aon story is evolving. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: How The Valley National Bancorp (VLY) Story Is Shifting With New US$16 Street Targets
summary: Valley National Bancorp is back in focus as several Wall Street firms converge on a fresh US$16 price target, set against an unchanged fair value estimate of US$14.96 in the latest model. This cluster of target moves sits within a broader rethink of midcap banks, where analysts are weighing sector volatility against expectations for loan growth, net interest margin and capital return. Read on to see what is driving the evolving analyst narrative and how you can track it from here. Stay...

headline: How The Whitbread (LSE:WTB) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Buybacks
summary: Whitbread’s central price target has shifted to £2,600, alongside only a very small move in the modelled fair value per share from £28.85 to £28.79. Recent research shows some firms lifting targets by £100 to £200, while another trims and moves to an Equal Weight stance at £2,600. This leaves you with a mixed but useful set of signals to interpret. Next, you will see how to read these changing targets and keep track of the evolving analyst story around the shares. Analyst Price Targets don't...
